description.value: > Wind Associated Domain: Air. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the lightning arc power of the Air domain. Wind Blast (Su): As a standard action, you can unleash a blast of air in a 30-foot line. Make a combat maneuver check against each creature in the line, using your caster level as your base attack bonus and your Wisdom modifier in place of your Strength modifier. Treat the results as a bull rush attempt. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 1stâ whispering wind, 6thâ wind walk, 9thâ winds of vengeance.
